notes:
2026-06-11 NIGHTLY:
MIN_SCORE 9->8 (RECURRING BUG): Config and trader.py both showed 9 for the 3rd time. Root cause: apply_config_to_trader() re-reads config before writing trader.py — if save_config() wasn't called in prior session, it propagates 9 again. Fixed this session explicitly in BOTH files.
BEARISH FVG INVERTED (-1 for SHORTs): Most significant change this session. Evidence: 18 short trades with Bearish FVG → WR 11% (2W/16L). 11 shorts WITHOUT Bearish FVG → WR 45% (5W/6L). 34 percentage point difference at n=18 is statistically significant. Theory: Bearish FVGs attract price back INTO the gap (upward), fighting short positions. Changed from +1 to -1 in trader.py. Signal weights split: fvg_bull_long=+1, fvg_bear_short=-1.
ATOM: 3/5 toward removal (5 trades, 0% WR, negative avg PnL required). Still watching.
RUNE: 5 trades, WR 20%, +3.3% avg via trail. Marginal. Keep watching.
TRAIL_PCT=8% KEPT: Avg win 8.5h. Trail IS the alpha.
MAX_TRADES=1 KEPT: DD -78.2%, do not increase risk.
NO CHANGE: ut_bot(1), trendline(1), min_adx(30), session, watchlist.
